name: Sprain or strain · RICE
summary: Sprain = ligament tear (joint). Strain = muscle/tendon tear. Common in sport.
recognition: Sudden pain at a joint or muscle
Often after a twist, awkward landing or over-stretch

callEmergency.text: Seek medical advice if you're unsure of the extent or there's no improvement.

steps: ICE: wrap an ice pack in a cloth (or tea towel between ice and skin) and apply for 10 minutes.
COMPRESSION: wrap a bandage to support. Monitor circulation beyond the injury.
ELEVATION: raise the injured area to reduce swelling.
If there's swelling change, skin colour change, or loss of sensation in the limb — remove the compression bandage.

warnings.text: Don't apply ice directly to skin — always wrap it.
If pain is severe or they can't bear weight, treat as a possible fracture (see Broken bones).
